abilities.name: Eye of Z'Desh
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Mind Blade
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LANCE] ability.

abilities.name: Infernal Avatar
abilities.description: Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Greyveil Hex
abilities.description:
Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Sorrowscent Vulture
abilities.description:
Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.
In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Warp Talons unit.

abilities.name: Terrorglut Parasite
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Voice of the Tyrant
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit has both abilities from the Tyrannical Motivation Detachment rule.

abilities.name: Raid Leader
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up after disembarking from a ^^**Transport**^^ that has made a Normal move this turn, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Dread Reputation
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, each enemy unit within 6” of the bearer’s unit (or within 12” if the bearer’s unit was set up using the Deep Strike ability) takes a Battle‑shock test.

abilities.name: Eager for Bloodshed
abilities.description: The bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Weaponised Hatred
abilities.description: Once per battle round, after your Vendetta target is destroyed, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can select one enemy unit visible to the bearer. That enemy unit becomes your Vendetta target until you select a new one.

abilities.name: Eyes of the Hunter
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Fratricidal Trophies
abilities.description: In a turn in which the bearer’s unit chose to Default to Doctrine, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Empyric Symbiote
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Infernal Fulgurite
abilities.description: Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Eye of the Warp
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Akshur's Binding Runes
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

abilities.name: Tzagulla
abilities.description: Improve the Attacks, Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s weapons by 1. In addition, each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, until the end of the turn, improve the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Wyredjinn
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Cybinfernal Font
abilities.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have the ^^**Soul Forge**^^ keyword.

abilities.name: Mark of the Soul Forges
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Crown of Worms
abilities.description: Add 3” to the range of the bearer’s Warpsmith, Master of Mechanisms and Enrage Machine Spirits abilities.

abilities.name: Warp Stalker
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Unholy Speed
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Mutant Form
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Wounds characteristic.

abilities.name: Massive Fangs
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by this model have the **[LANCE]** ability.

abilities.name: Eightfold Eyes
abilities.description: Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll or one saving throw made for this model.

abilities.name: Daemonic Flesh
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

abilities.name: Scorpion Tail
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abilities.name: Iron-hard Talons
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Dark Blessing
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of your opponent's Shooting phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model's unit has the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Warpsmith
abilities.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes Vehicle**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Master of Mechanisms
abilities.description: In your Command phase, select one friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes Vehicle**^^ model within 3" of this model. That **^^ Vehicle**^^ model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that **^^Vehicle**^^ makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

abilities.name: Enrage Machine Spirits
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy ^^**Vehicle**^^ unit within 12" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Chosen, Havocs, Legionaires**^^

abilities.name: Khorne
abilities.description: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model's hellforged weapons.

abilities.name: Nurgle
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

abilities.name: Slaanesh
abilities.description: Add 2" to this model's Move characteristic.

abilities.name: Tzeentch
abilities.description: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's infernal cannon.

abilities.name: Talisman of Burning Blood
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, roll one D3; until the end of the phase, add the result to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Eye of Tzeentch
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 8 or more, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Orbs of Unlife
abilities.description: At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for every enemy unit within 3" of the bearer, adding 1 to the result if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact that phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Intoxicating Elixir
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each time the bearer shoots or fights, if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact this phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test, after the bearer has resolved those attacks, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Warmaster's Gift
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, an unmodified successful wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

abilities.name: Eager for Vengeance
abilities.description: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. While doing so, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, add 1 to the Hit roll and each time you select your focus of hatred as a target of that unit's charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Eye of Abaddon
abilities.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your focus of hatred is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Mark of Legend
abilities.description: Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

abilities.name: Falsehood
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set up the bearer in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases, you can select one model in a friendly LEGIONARIES or CHOSEN unit that has two or more models remaining and is on the battlefield (excluding Attached units). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and the bearer is set up as close as possible to where that model was destroyed and only within Engagement Range of any units if the destroyed model was in Engagement Range of those units. The bearer now attaches to that unit as its Leader.

abilities.name: Cursed Fang
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and the bearer's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Shroud of Obfuscation
abilities.description: The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

abilities.name: Soul Link
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one other HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army (excluding EPIC HEROES). Until the start of your next Command phase, the bearer gains the PSYKER keyword, and replace the bearer's datasheet abilities with the datasheet abilities of the CHARACTER you selected.

abilities.name: Despot's Claim
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding one to the result if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Dread Reaver
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Mark of the Hound
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Tyrant's Lash
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for the bearer's unit, and the bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Willbreaker
abilities.description: In the Fight phase, after the bearer has made its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Night's Shroud
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Forge's Blessing
abilities.description: In your Command phase, select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Eater of Dread
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for each Battle-shocked enemy unit that is on the battlefield: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Bastion Plate
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Ironbound Enmity
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack while within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Warp Tracer
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Iron Artifice
abilities.description: The bearer's weapons have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] and [ANTI-FORTIFICATION 4+] abilities.

abilities.name: Amulet of Tainted Vigour
abilities.description: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed DAMNED models (excluding CHARACTER models) to the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Incendiary Goad
abilities.description: While the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by DAMNED models in that unit, and while that unit is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons as well.

abilities.name: Cultist's Brand
abilities.description: If every other model in the bearer's unit (excluding Dark Disciples) is DAMNED, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Warped Foresight
abilities.description: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Invigorated Mechatendrils
abilities.description: Add 4" to the bearer's Move characteristic.

abilities.name: Soul Harvester
abilities.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Tempting Addendum
abilities.description:
Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE from your army invokes its contract while within 3" of the bearer:
- If it suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of that Dark Pact, add 1 to the number of mortal wounds it suffers.
- Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Surgical Precision
abilities.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model (excluding DAMNED models) only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Living Carapace
abilities.description: CHAOS LORD model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Helm of All-Seeing
abilities.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

abilities.name: Prime Test Subject
abilities.description: **^^Heretic Astartes Infantry^^** model (excluding **^^Damned^^** models) only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one other CHARACTER model has already been attached to it (a unit cannot have two EXALTED CHAMPIONS attached to it). If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Helm of All-Seeing
abilities.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

abilities.name: Prime Test Subject
abilities.description: **^^Heretic Astartes Infantry^^** model (excluding **^^Damned^^** models) only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Touched by the Warp
abilities.description: The bearer gains the ^^**Psyker^^** keyword.

abilities.name: Eye of Z'Desh
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Mind Blade
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LANCE] ability.

abilities.name: Infernal Avatar
abilities.description: Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Greyveil Hex
abilities.description:
Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Sorrowscent Vulture
abilities.description:
Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.
In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Warp Talons unit.

abilities.name: Terrorglut Parasite
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Voice of the Tyrant
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit has both abilities from the Tyrannical Motivation Detachment rule.

abilities.name: Raid Leader
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up after disembarking from a ^^**Transport**^^ that has made a Normal move this turn, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Dread Reputation
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, each enemy unit within 6” of the bearer’s unit (or within 12” if the bearer’s unit was set up using the Deep Strike ability) takes a Battle‑shock test.

abilities.name: Eager for Bloodshed
abilities.description: The bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Weaponised Hatred
abilities.description: Once per battle round, after your Vendetta target is destroyed, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can select one enemy unit visible to the bearer. That enemy unit becomes your Vendetta target until you select a new one.

abilities.name: Eyes of the Hunter
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Fratricidal Trophies
abilities.description: In a turn in which the bearer’s unit chose to Default to Doctrine, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Empyric Symbiote
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Infernal Fulgurite
abilities.description: Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Eye of the Warp
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Akshur's Binding Runes
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

abilities.name: Tzagulla
abilities.description: Improve the Attacks, Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s weapons by 1. In addition, each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, until the end of the turn, improve the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Wyredjinn
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Cybinfernal Font
abilities.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have the ^^**Soul Forge**^^ keyword.

abilities.name: Mark of the Soul Forges
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Crown of Worms
abilities.description: Add 3” to the range of the bearer’s Warpsmith, Master of Mechanisms and Enrage Machine Spirits abilities.

abilities.name: Warp Stalker
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Unholy Speed
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Mutant Form
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Wounds characteristic.

abilities.name: Massive Fangs
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by this model have the **[LANCE]** ability.

abilities.name: Eightfold Eyes
abilities.description: Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll or one saving throw made for this model.

abilities.name: Daemonic Flesh
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

abilities.name: Scorpion Tail
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abilities.name: Iron-hard Talons
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Dark Blessing
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of your opponent's Shooting phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model's unit has the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ACCURSED CULTISTS
■ CHOSEN
■ CULTIST MOB
■ LEGIONARIES

abilities.name: Dark Zealotry
abilities.description: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a DARK APOSTLE model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Demagogue
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this unit’s DARK APOSTLE model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Malign Sacrifice
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, if this unit contains one or more Dark Disciple models, you can select one of those models and one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. That Dark Disciple model is then destroyed.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Talisman of Burning Blood
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, roll one D3; until the end of the phase, add the result to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Eye of Tzeentch
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 8 or more, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Orbs of Unlife
abilities.description: At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for every enemy unit within 3" of the bearer, adding 1 to the result if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact that phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Intoxicating Elixir
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each time the bearer shoots or fights, if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact this phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test, after the bearer has resolved those attacks, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Warmaster's Gift
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, an unmodified successful wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

abilities.name: Eager for Vengeance
abilities.description: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. While doing so, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, add 1 to the Hit roll and each time you select your focus of hatred as a target of that unit's charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Eye of Abaddon
abilities.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your focus of hatred is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Mark of Legend
abilities.description: Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

abilities.name: Falsehood
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set up the bearer in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases, you can select one model in a friendly LEGIONARIES or CHOSEN unit that has two or more models remaining and is on the battlefield (excluding Attached units). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and the bearer is set up as close as possible to where that model was destroyed and only within Engagement Range of any units if the destroyed model was in Engagement Range of those units. The bearer now attaches to that unit as its Leader.

abilities.name: Cursed Fang
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and the bearer's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Shroud of Obfuscation
abilities.description: The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

abilities.name: Soul Link
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one other HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army (excluding EPIC HEROES). Until the start of your next Command phase, the bearer gains the PSYKER keyword, and replace the bearer's datasheet abilities with the datasheet abilities of the CHARACTER you selected.

abilities.name: Despot's Claim
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding one to the result if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Dread Reaver
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Mark of the Hound
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Tyrant's Lash
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for the bearer's unit, and the bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Willbreaker
abilities.description: In the Fight phase, after the bearer has made its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Night's Shroud
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Forge's Blessing
abilities.description: In your Command phase, select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Eater of Dread
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for each Battle-shocked enemy unit that is on the battlefield: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Bastion Plate
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Ironbound Enmity
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack while within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Warp Tracer
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Iron Artifice
abilities.description: The bearer's weapons have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] and [ANTI-FORTIFICATION 4+] abilities.

abilities.name: Amulet of Tainted Vigour
abilities.description: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed DAMNED models (excluding CHARACTER models) to the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Incendiary Goad
abilities.description: While the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by DAMNED models in that unit, and while that unit is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons as well.

abilities.name: Cultist's Brand
abilities.description: If every other model in the bearer's unit (excluding Dark Disciples) is DAMNED, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Warped Foresight
abilities.description: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Invigorated Mechatendrils
abilities.description: Add 4" to the bearer's Move characteristic.

abilities.name: Soul Harvester
abilities.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Tempting Addendum
abilities.description:
Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE from your army invokes its contract while within 3" of the bearer:
- If it suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of that Dark Pact, add 1 to the number of mortal wounds it suffers.
- Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.description:
Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE from your army invokes its contract while within 3" of the bearer:
- If it suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of that Dark Pact, add 1 to the number of mortal wounds it suffers.
- Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Surgical Precision
abilities.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model (excluding DAMNED models) only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Living Carapace
abilities.description: CHAOS LORD model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Helm of All-Seeing
abilities.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

abilities.name: Prime Test Subject
abilities.description: **^^Heretic Astartes Infantry^^** model (excluding **^^Damned^^** models) only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Touched by the Warp
abilities.description: The bearer gains the ^^**Psyker^^** keyword.

abilities.name: Eye of Z'Desh
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Mind Blade
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LANCE] ability.

abilities.name: Infernal Avatar
abilities.description: Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Greyveil Hex
abilities.description:
Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Sorrowscent Vulture
abilities.description:
Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.
In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Warp Talons unit.

abilities.name: Terrorglut Parasite
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Voice of the Tyrant
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit has both abilities from the Tyrannical Motivation Detachment rule.

abilities.name: Raid Leader
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up after disembarking from a ^^**Transport**^^ that has made a Normal move this turn, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Dread Reputation
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, each enemy unit within 6” of the bearer’s unit (or within 12” if the bearer’s unit was set up using the Deep Strike ability) takes a Battle‑shock test.

abilities.name: Eager for Bloodshed
abilities.description: The bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Weaponised Hatred
abilities.description: Once per battle round, after your Vendetta target is destroyed, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can select one enemy unit visible to the bearer. That enemy unit becomes your Vendetta target until you select a new one.

abilities.name: Eyes of the Hunter
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Fratricidal Trophies
abilities.description: In a turn in which the bearer’s unit chose to Default to Doctrine, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Empyric Symbiote
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Infernal Fulgurite
abilities.description: Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Eye of the Warp
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Akshur's Binding Runes
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

abilities.name: Tzagulla
abilities.description: Improve the Attacks, Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s weapons by 1. In addition, each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, until the end of the turn, improve the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Wyredjinn
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Cybinfernal Font
abilities.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have the ^^**Soul Forge**^^ keyword.

abilities.name: Mark of the Soul Forges
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Crown of Worms
abilities.description: Add 3” to the range of the bearer’s Warpsmith, Master of Mechanisms and Enrage Machine Spirits abilities.

abilities.name: Khorne
abilities.description: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model's hellforged weapons.

abilities.name: Nurgle
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

abilities.name: Slaanesh
abilities.description: Add 2" to this model's Move characteristic.

abilities.name: Tzeentch
abilities.description: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's infernal cannon.

abilities.name: Warp Stalker
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Unholy Speed
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Mutant Form
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Wounds characteristic.

abilities.name: Massive Fangs
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by this model have the **[LANCE]** ability.

abilities.name: Eightfold Eyes
abilities.description: Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll or one saving throw made for this model.

abilities.name: Daemonic Flesh
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

abilities.name: Scorpion Tail
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abilities.name: Iron-hard Talons
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abilities.name: Dark Blessing
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of your opponent's Shooting phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model's unit has the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Veterans of the Long War
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Howling Horde
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit has shot, if one or more models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Horde move. To do so, roll one D6; this unit can move a number of inches up to the result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the nearest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Horde move while it is Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one other CHARACTER model has already been attached to it (a unit cannot have two MASTERS OF EXECUTIONS attached to it). If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Warp-sighted Butcher
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If that unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Trophy Taker
abilities.description: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Khorne
abilities.description: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model's hellforged weapons.

abilities.name: Nurgle
abilities.description: Add 1 to this model's Toughness characteristic.

abilities.name: Slaanesh
abilities.description: Add 2" to this model's Move characteristic.

abilities.name: Tzeentch
abilities.description: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's infernal cannon.

abilities.name: Talisman of Burning Blood
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, roll one D3; until the end of the phase, add the result to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Eye of Tzeentch
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 8 or more, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Orbs of Unlife
abilities.description: At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for every enemy unit within 3" of the bearer, adding 1 to the result if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact that phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Intoxicating Elixir
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each time the bearer shoots or fights, if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact this phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test, after the bearer has resolved those attacks, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Warmaster's Gift
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, an unmodified successful wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

abilities.name: Eager for Vengeance
abilities.description: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. While doing so, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, add 1 to the Hit roll and each time you select your focus of hatred as a target of that unit's charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Eye of Abaddon
abilities.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your focus of hatred is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Mark of Legend
abilities.description: Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

abilities.name: Falsehood
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set up the bearer in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases, you can select one model in a friendly LEGIONARIES or CHOSEN unit that has two or more models remaining and is on the battlefield (excluding Attached units). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and the bearer is set up as close as possible to where that model was destroyed and only within Engagement Range of any units if the destroyed model was in Engagement Range of those units. The bearer now attaches to that unit as its Leader.

abilities.name: Cursed Fang
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and the bearer's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Shroud of Obfuscation
abilities.description: The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

abilities.name: Soul Link
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one other HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army (excluding EPIC HEROES). Until the start of your next Command phase, the bearer gains the PSYKER keyword, and replace the bearer's datasheet abilities with the datasheet abilities of the CHARACTER you selected.

abilities.name: Despot's Claim
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding one to the result if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Dread Reaver
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Mark of the Hound
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Tyrant's Lash
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for the bearer's unit, and the bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Willbreaker
abilities.description: In the Fight phase, after the bearer has made its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Night's Shroud
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Forge's Blessing
abilities.description: In your Command phase, select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Eater of Dread
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for each Battle-shocked enemy unit that is on the battlefield: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Bastion Plate
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Ironbound Enmity
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack while within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Warp Tracer
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Iron Artifice
abilities.description: The bearer's weapons have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] and [ANTI-FORTIFICATION 4+] abilities.

abilities.name: Amulet of Tainted Vigour
abilities.description: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed DAMNED models (excluding CHARACTER models) to the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Incendiary Goad
abilities.description: While the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by DAMNED models in that unit, and while that unit is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons as well.

abilities.name: Cultist's Brand
abilities.description: If every other model in the bearer's unit (excluding Dark Disciples) is DAMNED, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Warped Foresight
abilities.description: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.description: At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Invigorated Mechatendrils
abilities.description: Add 4" to the bearer's Move characteristic.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This unit can be attached to the following unit:
■ TRAITOR GUARDSMAN SQUAD

abilities.name: Brutal Example
abilities.description: Once per turn, while this unit is leading a unit and contains a TRAITOR ENFORCER model, you can target that unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit from your army with that Stratagem this phase. Each time you use this ability, one Bodyguard model in that unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: Mutated Bodyguard
abilities.description: While this unit contains a Traitor Ogryn model, CHARACTER models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This unit's TRAITOR ENFORCER model has a 5+ invulnerable save

abilities.name: Talisman of Burning Blood
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, roll one D3; until the end of the phase, add the result to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Eye of Tzeentch
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 8 or more, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Orbs of Unlife
abilities.description: At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for every enemy unit within 3" of the bearer, adding 1 to the result if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact that phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Intoxicating Elixir
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each time the bearer shoots or fights, if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact this phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test, after the bearer has resolved those attacks, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Warmaster's Gift
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, an unmodified successful wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

abilities.name: Eager for Vengeance
abilities.description: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. While doing so, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, add 1 to the Hit roll and each time you select your focus of hatred as a target of that unit's charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Eye of Abaddon
abilities.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your focus of hatred is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Mark of Legend
abilities.description: Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

abilities.name: Falsehood
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set up the bearer in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases, you can select one model in a friendly LEGIONARIES or CHOSEN unit that has two or more models remaining and is on the battlefield (excluding Attached units). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and the bearer is set up as close as possible to where that model was destroyed and only within Engagement Range of any units if the destroyed model was in Engagement Range of those units. The bearer now attaches to that unit as its Leader.

abilities.name: Cursed Fang
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and the bearer's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Shroud of Obfuscation
abilities.description: The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

abilities.name: Soul Link
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one other HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army (excluding EPIC HEROES). Until the start of your next Command phase, the bearer gains the PSYKER keyword, and replace the bearer's datasheet abilities with the datasheet abilities of the CHARACTER you selected.

abilities.name: Despot's Claim
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding one to the result if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Dread Reaver
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Mark of the Hound
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Tyrant's Lash
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for the bearer's unit, and the bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Willbreaker
abilities.description: In the Fight phase, after the bearer has made its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Night's Shroud
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Forge's Blessing
abilities.description: In your Command phase, select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Eater of Dread
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for each Battle-shocked enemy unit that is on the battlefield: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Bastion Plate
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Ironbound Enmity
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack while within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Warp Tracer
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Iron Artifice
abilities.description: The bearer's weapons have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] and [ANTI-FORTIFICATION 4+] abilities.

abilities.name: Amulet of Tainted Vigour
abilities.description: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed DAMNED models (excluding CHARACTER models) to the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Incendiary Goad
abilities.description: While the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by DAMNED models in that unit, and while that unit is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons as well.

abilities.name: Cultist's Brand
abilities.description: If every other model in the bearer's unit (excluding Dark Disciples) is DAMNED, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Warped Foresight
abilities.description: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Invigorated Mechatendrils
abilities.description: Add 4" to the bearer's Move characteristic.

abilities.name: Soul Harvester
abilities.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Tempting Addendum
abilities.description:
Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE from your army invokes its contract while within 3" of the bearer:
- If it suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of that Dark Pact, add 1 to the number of mortal wounds it suffers.
- Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Surgical Precision
abilities.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model (excluding DAMNED models) only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Living Carapace
abilities.description: CHAOS LORD model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Helm of All-Seeing
abilities.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

abilities.name: Prime Test Subject
abilities.description: **^^Heretic Astartes Infantry^^** model (excluding **^^Damned^^** models) only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Touched by the Warp
abilities.description: The bearer gains the ^^**Psyker^^** keyword.

abilities.name: Eye of Z'Desh
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Mind Blade
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LANCE] ability.

abilities.name: Infernal Avatar
abilities.description: Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Greyveil Hex
abilities.description:
Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abilities.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Sorrowscent Vulture
abilities.description:
Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.
In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Warp Talons unit.

abilities.name: Terrorglut Parasite
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Voice of the Tyrant
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit has both abilities from the Tyrannical Motivation Detachment rule.

abilities.name: Raid Leader
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up after disembarking from a ^^**Transport**^^ that has made a Normal move this turn, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Dread Reputation
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, each enemy unit within 6” of the bearer’s unit (or within 12” if the bearer’s unit was set up using the Deep Strike ability) takes a Battle‑shock test.

abilities.name: Eager for Bloodshed
abilities.description: The bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Weaponised Hatred
abilities.description: Once per battle round, after your Vendetta target is destroyed, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can select one enemy unit visible to the bearer. That enemy unit becomes your Vendetta target until you select a new one.

abilities.name: Eyes of the Hunter
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Fratricidal Trophies
abilities.description: In a turn in which the bearer’s unit chose to Default to Doctrine, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Empyric Symbiote
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Infernal Fulgurite
abilities.description: Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Eye of the Warp
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Akshur's Binding Runes

abilities.description: Improve the Attacks, Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s weapons by 1. In addition, each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, until the end of the turn, improve the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Wyredjinn
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Blood Surge
abilities.description: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Blood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 2 to the roll: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Blood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Blood Surge move per phase.

abilities.name: Flames of Change (Psychic)
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Altered Reality (Psychic)
abilities.description: Once per battle round, after a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw is made for this model, you can change the result of that roll to a 6.

abilities.name: Talisman of Burning Blood
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, roll one D3; until the end of the phase, add the result to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

abilities.name: Eye of Tzeentch
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 8 or more, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Orbs of Unlife
abilities.description: At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for every enemy unit within 3" of the bearer, adding 1 to the result if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact that phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Intoxicating Elixir
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each time the bearer shoots or fights, if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact this phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test, after the bearer has resolved those attacks, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Warmaster's Gift
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, an unmodified successful wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

abilities.name: Eager for Vengeance
abilities.description: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. While doing so, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, add 1 to the Hit roll and each time you select your focus of hatred as a target of that unit's charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Eye of Abaddon
abilities.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your focus of hatred is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Mark of Legend
abilities.description: Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

abilities.name: Falsehood
abilities.description: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set up the bearer in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases, you can select one model in a friendly LEGIONARIES or CHOSEN unit that has two or more models remaining and is on the battlefield (excluding Attached units). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and the bearer is set up as close as possible to where that model was destroyed and only within Engagement Range of any units if the destroyed model was in Engagement Range of those units. The bearer now attaches to that unit as its Leader.

abilities.name: Cursed Fang
abilities.description: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and the bearer's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Shroud of Obfuscation
abilities.description: The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

abilities.name: Soul Link
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one other HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army (excluding EPIC HEROES). Until the start of your next Command phase, the bearer gains the PSYKER keyword, and replace the bearer's datasheet abilities with the datasheet abilities of the CHARACTER you selected.

abilities.name: Despot's Claim
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding one to the result if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Dread Reaver
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent's deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Mark of the Hound
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Tyrant's Lash
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for the bearer's unit, and the bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Willbreaker
abilities.description: In the Fight phase, after the bearer has made its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Night's Shroud
abilities.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Forge's Blessing
abilities.description: In your Command phase, select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Eater of Dread
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for each Battle-shocked enemy unit that is on the battlefield: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Bastion Plate
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: Ironbound Enmity
abilities.description: Each time the bearer makes an attack while within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Warp Tracer
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Iron Artifice
abilities.description: The bearer's weapons have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] and [ANTI-FORTIFICATION 4+] abilities.

abilities.name: Amulet of Tainted Vigour
abilities.description: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed DAMNED models (excluding CHARACTER models) to the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Incendiary Goad
abilities.description: While the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by DAMNED models in that unit, and while that unit is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons as well.

abilities.name: Cultist's Brand
abilities.description: If every other model in the bearer's unit (excluding Dark Disciples) is DAMNED, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Warped Foresight
abilities.description: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Invigorated Mechatendrils
abilities.description: Add 4" to the bearer's Move characteristic.

abilities.name: Soul Harvester
abilities.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Tempting Addendum
abilities.description:
Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE from your army invokes its contract while within 3" of the bearer:
- If it suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of that Dark Pact, add 1 to the number of mortal wounds it suffers.
- Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Surgical Precision
abilities.description: HERETIC ASTARTES model (excluding DAMNED models) only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Living Carapace
abilities.description: CHAOS LORD model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Helm of All-Seeing
abilities.description: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.
